title: hieracium transiens subsp. liberatidens
intro: Hieracium transiens subsp. liberatidens, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium transiens subsp. liberatidens include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
